end_city_loot.title: Complete a full End City + End Ship clear — Elytra from Ship, Shulker Shells from city floors

subtitle.text: Every End City has a Ship. Every Ship has an Elytra. Clear them in order. Do not skip the chests.

description: CH.13 · END CITY SWEEP
▸ End Cities are the primary loot source
of the outer End islands.
Each one has multiple floors of Shulker spawns,
a loot chest on each floor,
and an End Ship floating beside it.
The Ship has the best loot in the End.
◈ END CITY STRUCTURE
└ Tower floors: Shulker spawns + floor chests
Each floor: enchanted diamond/iron loot, saddles
└ End Ship: floating beside the tower
Contains: Elytra in item frame + 2 treasure chests
Treasure chests: enchanted books, diamonds, rare loot
└ Shulker Shells: 2 per kill at best, 0 at worst
Farm 6+ Shulkers per visit for 2-4 shells
◈ SHULKER BOX ECONOMY
└ Shulker Box = most powerful inventory item in game
27 stacks that count as 1 inventory slot
└ Craft: 2 Shulker Shells + 1 Chest
└ Priority: make 27 Shulker Boxes
That is 27×27 = 729 additional inventory slots
└ Use for: sorting resources, End City loot transport,
boss preparation kits, travel packs
◈ END SHIP APPROACH
└ Careful: End Ship chest room has 2 Elder Guardians
Wait — no, that's Ocean Monument. End Ship: no guardian.
└ Careful: item frame Elytra will drop if frame is broken
Destroy frame carefully to avoid Elytra falling into void
└ Pillars: End Crystals on obsidian pillars on main island
destroy them before Dragon fight to prevent healing
▶ Complete a full End City + Ship clear [check]
▶ Craft 4 Shulker Boxes
◇ Outer End islands stretch far. Use Elytra + Fireworks.
Bring full stacks of Firework Rockets.
You will need to travel 1000+ blocks between cities.
The void is below the whole time.
